name: Wednesday's Chili
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces French Onion Soup Can (not creamy)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the hamburger in oil until no pink remains.
2. Blend the French onion soup for several seconds.
3. Pour the blended soup over the browned meat and simmer on medium high heat for about 5 minutes until well done.
4. Add the remaining ingredients.
